jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Emeritus
jsonLd.description:
Emeritus, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Emeritus:
Emeritus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emeritus!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
